description: The UserPermissions component is used to control the permissions of users in a world for the selected roles.

fields.AllowEnableEditMode: Whether the selected roles can enable their Edit Mode.
fields.AllowRespawn: Whether the selected roles can respawn other users.
fields.AllowSilence: Whether the selected roles can silence other users.
fields.AllowKick: Whether the selected roles can kick other users from the session.
fields.AllowBan: Whether the selected roles can ban other users from this session.
fields.AllowAssignRoles: Whether the selected roles can assign roles for other users that have a role less than them.
fields.AllowSeeOtherRoles: Whether the selected roles can see what roles other users have.
